channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: War with Iran; Iranian source acknowledges US ‘outreach’ as war rages on and oil prices climb over $100 - CNN

item.description:
1. Gregory Bovino’s Final Days: Harsh Words and Few Regrets  The New York Times
  2. Trump border patrol chief Greg Bovino to retire  BBC
  3. Trump’s Ousted Border Patrol Goon Lashes Out After Humiliating Downfall  The Daily Beast
  4. Bovino Called Immigrants Trash but Considered Himself a Minority  Yahoo
  5. Revealed: Ex-border chief Greg Bovino claimed minority status for himself  rawstory.com

item.title: Israel, Iran trade strikes as U.S. says it is pausing attacks on energy targets - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Israel, Iran trade strikes as U.S. says it is pausing attacks on energy targets  The Washington Post
  2. Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Fires Missile Barrage at Israel After U.S. Claims Progress on Talks  The New York Times
  3. "A Head For An Eye": Iran Warns Trump That US' "Final Deadline" Is Near  NDTV
  4. Airstrikes batter Iran as it attacks Israel and Gulf states  WAVY.com
  5. Iran Strikes Israel as War Rages on After Trump’s Disputed Mention of Peace Talks  Time Magazine

item.title: How Pakistan Is Trying to Reshape Its Image Abroad - The New York Times
item.description:
1. How Pakistan Is Trying to Reshape Its Image Abroad  The New York Times
  2. Pakistan Tightens Grip on Media as Political Crisis Deepens  streamlinefeed.co.ke
  3. When Narratives Become Weapons: A Call to Pakistan’s Conscious Minds in a Shifting Global Order  Minute Mirror
  4. Pakistan Mulls Over Ramping Up Its Media Narrative War  TechJuice
